description: Coulson initiates contact with Eva Belyakov in the market, offering her safety. Despite his efforts, Eva is hostile and is quickly aided by armed thugs who take a young girl hostage and escape, prompting the team to scramble in response. May alerts Coulson to approaching locals, indicating the danger is escalating.

transcript.line: Hello. May I? My name is Phil Coulson, and I'm here to help. My group specializes in helping people like you, who have gifts.
And why should I trust you?
Because I could take you somewhere safe. I know you've been on the run, but S.H.I.E.L.D. can protect you. You're not alone in all of this.
Locals incoming. Gun. Blue shirt.
Agent O'Brien. Be sure they don't interfer.
Why don't we go somewhere more secure?
Hey. Can I talk you for a minute?
No. I like it here.
Coulson, we're running out of time.
These men can't help you. Let's talk somewhere calmer. What is it you're looking for?
Pain.
Easy.
Drop your weapons now.
Easy!
Step back!
Drop the damn gun.
Easy. Let her go.
Just put the girl down. I'll come with you.
Let my men go. We can all walk away from this.
Stand back! Do not follow us!
